title: JCI regained strength at last minute
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) regained strength at the closing bell today (8/10). This is an improvement from its opening position, in which JCI dropped to 7,455.23.

title: Expanding market to MSMEs, Master Print confident of double-digit growth post-IPO
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR), a packaging manufacturer freshly debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (8/10), is preparing to see significant growth of up to double digit at the end of this year and next year, driven by new product launch.

title: Astra Graphia to distribute interim dividend of IDR 25.63 billion
body: PT Astra Graphia Tbk (ASGR), one of many subsidiaries of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), announced its plan to allocate interim dividend of IDR 25.63 billion or IDR 19 per share.

title: Officially debuting, Verona Indah Pictures to challenge movie industry and double revenue
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) has officially made its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) as of today (8/10), offering 1.12 billion shares for IDR 195 each.

title: NETV management board resigns
body: The Board of Commissioners and Directors of PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) collectively submitted their resignations to shareholders yesterday (7/10).

title: JCI regained strength at last minute
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) regained strength at the closing bell today (8/10). This is an improvement from its opening position, in which JCI dropped to 7,455.23.

title: Expanding market to MSMEs, Master Print confident of double-digit growth post-IPO
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR), a packaging manufacturer freshly debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (8/10), is preparing to see significant growth of up to double digit at the end of this year and next year, driven by new product launch.

title: Astra Graphia to distribute interim dividend of IDR 25.63 billion
body: PT Astra Graphia Tbk (ASGR), one of many subsidiaries of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), announced its plan to allocate interim dividend of IDR 25.63 billion or IDR 19 per share.

title: Officially debuting, Verona Indah Pictures to challenge movie industry and double revenue
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) has officially made its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) as of today (8/10), offering 1.12 billion shares for IDR 195 each.

title: NETV management board resigns
body: The Board of Commissioners and Directors of PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) collectively submitted their resignations to shareholders yesterday (7/10).

title: More than 80 million Media Nusantara Citra (MNCN) shares released by Global Mediacom
body: PT Global Mediacom Tbk, the company's controlling shareholder, released 80.52 million shares of PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk (MNCN) on Thursday, October 3. Both issuers are media-related members of the MNC Group. Prior to this most recent sale, Global Mediacom owned 40.24% of MNCN; however, its share portion has now dropped to 39.7%. This transaction was carried out through PT KB Valbury Sekuritas.

title: MEDC set up tender offer of 2 subsidiaries’ bonds, here’s the result
body: PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) announces the result of tender offer of two Senior Bonds maturing in 2026 and 2027 issued by two of its subsidiaries, namely Medco Oak Tree Pte, Ltd dan Medco Bell Pte Ltd.

title: PGAS eyes 15 BBTUD industrial gas potential in Sulawesi
body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara (PGAS) or PGN is eyeing the potential of industrial natural gas development with total volume of up to 15 BBTUD in Sulawesi through the signing of 2 Memorandums of Understanding (MoU).

title: TOBA allocates IDR 474.58 billion for buyback
body: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) is allocating IDR 474.58 billion to repurchase (buyback) a maximum of 10% of total issued and paid-up capital.

title: FILM to take over NETV management
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) will branch out to television broadcast industry following the acquisition of PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV), the operator of NET Televisi.

title: Global venture funding slowed down in Q3 2024, mostly went to AI sector
body: The amount of venture capital funding in the global market reached USD 66.5 billion in the third quarter (Q3) of 2024, slowing down 16% quarter-to-quarter (qoq), or down 15% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Morning session saw JCI weakened
body: At the opening bell of today’s (7/10) trading session, Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) plummeted to 7,460.60. Until 11 AM WIB, it remained idle at 7,495.56.

title: BJTM to acquire 476.19 million shares of BEKS
body: PT BPD Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) will acquire 476.19 million shares of the issued and paid-up capital of PT BPD Banten Tbk (BEKS). The shareholders have agreed upon the investment of IDR 10 billion in BEKS.

title: Rig Tenders Indonesia to acquire another vessel for IDR 10.1 billion
body: PT Rig Tenders Indonesia Tbk (RIGS), through one of its subsidiaries, PT Batuah Abadi Lines (PTBAL), has secured a new additional vessel to its fleet.

title: TAMU to divest vessels to Pertamina for USD 13.79 million
body: PT Pelayaran Tamarin Samudra Tbk (TAMU), an oil and gas supporting service provider, has divested 1 unit of vessel to PT Pertamina Trans Kontinental.

title: Sepatu Bata’s loss keep worsening, hit IDR 127.35 billion in H1 2024
body: PT Sepatu Bata Tbk (BATA), a footwear manufacturer debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) circa 1982, booked a loss of IDR 127.35 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Returning to green zone, net foreign volume closed at 206.65 million shares
body: Stock buying and selling activities by foreign investors on Friday, October 4, ended with a net foreign volume returning to the green zone at 206.65 million shares. The foreign buying volume was 4.16 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 3.96 billion shares. Furthermore, unlike the previous day, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) are now the most purchased, totaling up to 2.25 billion shares and a net volume of 655.09 million shares.

title: Billions of Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume falls to -1.61 billion shares
body: Foreign investors sold 2.12 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Thursday, October 3, for a net volume of -1.11 billion shares. The share sale then triggered the foreign sales volume to jump to 4.91 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only 3.30 billion shares, bringing net foreign volume to -1.61 billion shares.

title: 3 Indonesian startups received funding of more than US$28.5 million this week
body: A total of 3 startups from Indonesia have received funding totaling more than US$28.5 million this week.

title: Pefindo gives “idA” rating to Merdeka Battery Materials
body: The Indonesian Securities Rating Agency (Pefindo) has assigned an "idA" rating to Bond II Year 2024 issued by PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA), and confirmed the same rating for the bonds that have been issued.

title: JCI slows down this weekend
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) plummeted until today’s (4/10) closing bell. The index was at 7,476.99 nearing the end of today’s trading session.

title: WMI to secure loan facility of IDR 681.21 billion
body: PT Harum Nickel Industry (HNI) channels loan facility of USD 45 million, equal to IDR 681.21 billion to support operational activities of PT Westrong Metal Industry (WMI).

title: Medco Energi Internasional to distribute interim divind of IDR 15.75 per share
body: PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) is readying interim dividend distribution of USD 25.89 million or IDR 15.75 per share.

title: Improving International Services Access, BNI Relocates Singapore Office to the Strategic Raffles Place
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI continues to strive to improve service accessibility for international customers.

title: First half in, MDKA saw 110% surge in revenue
body: The performance of PT Merdeka Gold Coppert Tbk (MDKA) skyrocketed in the first half (H1) of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Eight million shares in Arkadia Digital (DIGI) acquired by Iwa Sukresno Karunia
body: On Wednesday, October 2, individual investor Iwa Sukresno Karunia invested 8 million more shares in PT Arkadia Digital Media Tbk (DIGI), a web portal and multimedia content industry business. Iwa's share portion increased from 24.75% to 25.24% through the transaction via PT Korea Investment And Sekuritas Indonesia. Furthermore, Low Tuck Kwong acquired 95,800 shares in the mining industry issuer and coal contractor PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), while Eko Desriyanto also purchased 2 million shares in the hotel and restaurant management company PT Idea Indonesia Tbk (IDEA).

title: Foreign buying volume rises, net foreign volume surplus to 712.63 million shares
body: Foreign buying volume on Wednesday, October 2, increased significantly, reaching 6.15 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume totaled just 5.44 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of approximately 712.63 million shares. The purchase of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) amounted to 2.12 billion shares with a net volume of 808.16 million shares, then started the share trading list.

title: Low Tuck Kwong acquires 1.5 billion shares of Bayan Resources (BYAN)
body: On Monday, September 30, Low Tuck Kwong, the founder and president of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), acquired over 1.5 billion shares from the coal mining issuer. His share portion of BYAN has increased to 40.16% from his previous 35% control. He utilized PT Maybank Sekuritas Indonesia and BUT Deutsche Bank AG to complete this share purchase transaction.

title: Sluggish in the morning, NCKL has plummeted 25.6% since IPO
body: Stock performance of PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) or Harita Nickel slipped IDR 20 this morning (4/10), contrasting with yesterday’s (3/10) ever-increasing trend all day.

title: Sawitmas Parenggan eyes IDR 110 billion through MTN issuance
body: PT Sawitmas Parenggan, a palm plantation company operated since 2006 in Central Kalimantan, has issued Medium Term Notes (MTN) with total principal worth IDR 110 billion.

title: Astra Internasional to set up interim dividend distribution of IDR 3.96 trillion
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), a multi-sector holding company, announces its plan to distribute interim dividend of IDR 3.96 trillion or IDR 98 per share in the near future.

title: JCI slipped again this morning
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) weakened at today’s (4/10) opening bell. The shift brought the index even lower compared to yesterday’s (3/10) closing position.

title: Prajogo Pangestu to raise stakes in BREN
body: Prajogo Pangestu has increased its ownership portion in PT Barito Renewables Energi Tbk (BREN) for investment purposes.

title: Strengthening corporate services, BBNI readies BNI Direct
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) will launch BNI Direct, a digital platform designed to improve services for corporate users.

title: OJK to issue investigation on Prajogo Pangestu’s companies
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) is currently investigating two Barito Group companies, PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) and PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN), regarding false trading allegation in the stock market.
